title: ambora quadrifida
intro: Ambora quadrifida, also known as the four-angled ambarella tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ambora quadrifida include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, the fruit of the plant is often used to make teas, juices, and jams, while the leaves and bark are used to create infusions and decoctions for medicinal purposes.
